title: Saanjh
subTitle: SAANJH tells the story of Shyam and Sandhya, childhood friends who meet for the last time. Shyam loves Sandhya, but she sees him only as a friend. We surprisingly learn that Shyam is actually struggling with mental disorder, and Sandhya is nothing but just in his imagination. Despite the calm riverbank setting, Shyam's inner struggles are evident. As Shyam faces reality, he realizes he must accept things as they are, showing the power of love and understanding ourselves.

title: Signature
subTitle: A single mother, living in a small village, takes care of her little daughter's educational expenses by doing tailoring work. One day, she receives a pension letter, for which she has to visit the Gramin bank. There, she encounters something unexpected.

title: On The Spot
subTitle: On a fateful day, Parul hails a taxi to visit her boyfriend Ansh. Ansh, eagerly anticipating her arrival, is thrown into restlessness. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when the taxi driver receives news of his daughter falling ill. Witnessing this, Parul's compassionate response sparks anger in Ansh. Yet, in the face of adversity, Parul's decision unfolds, offering inspiration to the youth.

title: Sita Ram Chaddha
subTitle: Sita Ram Chaddha, a widower, longs for attention from his son and daughter-in-law who are busy with their own lives. Seeing his loneliness, Biba, his daughter, decides to help him out.

title: O Re Saajan
subTitle: A mid-thirties property broker in Lucknow named Sajan Tiwari engages in an illicit liaison, only to be discovered by his five-year-old son Bunty. Subsequently, Sajan becomes frantic in his attempts to prevent Bunty from divulging this information to his spouse Manju, resulting in a lighthearted depiction of provincial life, interpersonal bonds, and domestic affairs.

subTitle: After some time apart, Meera and Ranbir find their relationship at a point where it becomes a perfect example of the shallowness and fragility of modern-day dating.

title: Dubki
subTitle: Dubki is a story based on a true incident of a female constable in male-dominated law enforcement. Despite being a tough and dominant constable at the Lalkurti police station, Ganga Yadav was troubled several times by SHO Durgesh Mishra. Ganga complained about it to the IPS officer and asked for a transfer; however, he refused to help her. The female constable was left with no other choice but to take justice into her own hands.

title: Firni
subTitle: Firni

title: Dwand
subTitle: Ruby, raised to believe in her potential, however, finds herself married to a traditional man, Vivek. After motherhood, she decides to pursue an advertising career, sparking unforeseen troubles.

title: Duty
subTitle: Individuals from different walks of life and social classes demonstrate the interdependence of each social stratum on the other through their duties and responsibilities.

title: Cycle Of Sorrows
subTitle: Set in a rural village, this heart-wrenching story follows a poor father with a beloved daughter, who still yearns for a son as his pregnant wife prepares to give birth. Driven by financial hardship, he makes a tragic decision that not only shatters his family but leaves his relationship with his daughter and wife forever scarred. Watch this emotional tale of a father's regret and the lasting impact on his family. Can he undo the damage he's caused?

title: Electric Piya
subTitle: A light bulb falls in love with a human.

title: Didi!
subTitle: Didi!

title: Desh Ki Pardesh ?
subTitle: Desh Ki Pardesh ?

title: Foul
subTitle: Against the setting of a journey to Thailand, Ayush, a lustful businessman, possesses both the capability and cleverness to be unfaithful to his wife and shatter her aspirations of moving to Canada. Yet, the question remains: Can he thwart her pursuit of realizing her dreams?

title: Foul

subTitle: Are we using social media to expand our horizon or are we overusing it and unknowingly desensitizing ourselves? Faboo explores this aspect of social media and nudges us to think about it through this story of a mother and son.

title: First Sin
subTitle: What would you do if you unexpectedly obtain magical powers? Ashwath, a failed businessman is having a troubled relationship with his wife. One fine morning he gets a Sand-timer at his doorstep. Life takes a turn when he discovers magical powers in it. Will the Sand-timer be a boon or curse?

subTitle: Follow the emotional struggle between ambitious youth and weary elders facing the grip of old age as they endure the pain of losing independence and becoming reliant on others.

subTitle: The Visit

title: Barking Bruno
subTitle: While Rohit lovingly takes care of his dog, Bruno, Mr Mehra's children mistreat him. However, matters change when Mr Mehra meets Bruno.

title: Choices
subTitle: Just one day before their wedding, Ritesh confesses something to Yami that threatens to change the course of their relationship.

title: Chashmadeed
subTitle: An ageing mother, living with her entitled son and his wife, finds her sight blurring and clearing like a malfunctioning camera lens one morning. Soon, a visit to a nearby eye clinic, strongly suggested by her young neighbour, leads to unexpected revelations.

title: Bed Tea
subTitle: An unexpected tale of a rainy morning brings about a question about the existence of hidden evil behaviour in relationships.

title: Bepar
subTitle: On the surface, Indian immigrant Kritika and her Pakistani husband Faiz appear to be happily married. Underneath, however, their inter-faith union is caught in between love and cultural differences.

title: Bita Hua Pal
subTitle: The journey of a woman named Mira, who, like many others, finds herself questioning the foundation of her relationship. As she navigates the ups and downs of her own love story, she reflects on the nature of love and the challenges of maintaining a lasting connection.

title: Bhagwaan - The Faith
subTitle: A routine gym outing for three friends becomes a series of unusual interactions with diverse strangers. Their day reaches a pivotal moment when they cross paths with an enigmatic street dweller.

title: Bully
subTitle: A girl holds her brother hostage, however, she must confront the dark side of her life and face the harsh truths that threaten to break her.

title: Best Friend
subTitle: A misunderstanding about his lover and friend propels Manav into a violent rage.

title: Chaar Pandrah
subTitle: A suspense film about a military guy meeting a Stranger at the bus stop who asks him to stay at his house for the night, as he has a wrong ticket and his house is very far. But he starts to have strange feeling about the stranger's wife.

title: Beshak
subTitle: A wife struggles to differentiate between her dreams and reality, which affects her daily life. Consequently, their once-strong marriage faces unexpected challenges.

title: Black Coffee
subTitle: A woman faces sexual harassment at the hands of her boss. Later, she decides to teach him a lesson with the help of her colleague.

title: Beyond Failing
subTitle: A young student struggles with academic pressure due to poor performance. However, she sets out on a path of self-discovery and soon finds her true passion.

title: Blame Game
subTitle: Blame Game

title: Bridge
subTitle: Widower Mukesh lives with son Rahul, 28. Rahul finds his father's behavior odd and Mukesh resents his son's constant judgment of his choices.
